nasb.text: Also you shall not have intercourse with any animal to be defiled with it, nor shall any woman stand before an animal to mate with it; it is a perversion.

esv.text: And you shall not lie with any animal and so make yourself unclean with it, neither shall any woman give herself to an animal to lie with it: it is perversion.

cnv.text: 你不可與任何走獸同睡交合，因牠而玷污自己；女人也不可站在走獸面前，與牠交合；這是逆性的事。

ccb.text: 不可与兽类交合，玷污自己。女人也不可与兽类交合。这是变态行为。
